xsl:when.test: (../../strikethrough_retail_price and (../../strikethrough_retail_price and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross)) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ((../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and price/@gross != ../../price/@gross and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > price/@gross)))
string-length($kod_producer) = '14' or string-length($kod_producer) = '13' or string-length($kod_producer) = '12' or string-length($kod_producer) = '8'
string-length($code_on_card) = '14' or string-length($code_on_card) = '13' or string-length($code_on_card) = '12' or string-length($code_on_card) = '8'

xsl:variable.name: listaAtrybutow
xsl:variable.select: 'Waga [kg] unit_price_kg Objętość_kg Waga [g] Pojemność unit_price_ml Objętość_ml pojemnik ml Długość [m] Długość [cm]'

xsl:when.test: ../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność' and @distinction = 'y']/value/@name != '' and ../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność' and @distinction = 'y'] and not(contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'do') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, '/') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, ',') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, '-') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'x')) and (contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'ml') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'l') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'ltr') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'L'))

../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name != '' and ../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność'] and not(contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'do') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, '/') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, ',') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, '-') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'x')) and (contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'ml') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'l') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'ltr') or contains(../../parameters/parameter[@name = 'Pojemność']/value/@name, 'L'))
